name: houdini_abc_convert
description: Creates an Alembic node connected to a Convert node inside a new Geometry object in Houdini via hou_bridge.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

class Houdini_Abc_ConvertNode(BaseNode):
    name = "houdini_abc_convert"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("abc_path", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_output("geo_path", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        abc_file = inputs.get("abc_path", "")

        if not abc_file:
            self.log_error("No Alembic path provided.")
            return {"geo_path": "", "exec_out": True}

        try:
            bridge = get_bridge()

            # Create a new Geometry container in /obj
            geo_result = bridge.create_node("/obj", "geo", "vibrante_abc_import")
            geo_path = geo_result["path"]

            # Clean default nodes inside the new geo node
            children = bridge.children(geo_path)
            for child in children:
                bridge.delete_node(child["path"])

            # Create Alembic node
            abc_result = bridge.create_node(geo_path, "alembic", "input_alembic")
            abc_node_path = abc_result["path"]
            bridge.set_parm(abc_node_path, "fileName", abc_file)

            # Create Convert node and wire it up
            convert_result = bridge.create_node(geo_path, "convert", "convert_to_polygons")
            convert_node_path = convert_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(abc_node_path, convert_node_path, output=0, input_idx=0)

            # Setup display/render flags
            bridge.set_display_flag(convert_node_path, True)
            bridge.set_render_flag(convert_node_path, True)

            # Layout inside the container
            bridge.layout_children(geo_path)

            return {
                "geo_path": geo_path,
                "exec_out": True
            }

        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Houdini Bridge Execution Failed: {str(e)}")
            return {"geo_path": "", "exec_out": True}

def register_node():
    return Houdini_Abc_ConvertNode
